## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy's marketing direction changes and align on content strategy with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is shifting focus to "AI data analysis" and moving away from data governance emphasis](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Content strategy to prioritize AI and data topics, tying into big picture analytics](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [GrowthX's role may expand beyond SEO content to support broader marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Cody will be out for two weeks; immediate action needed on content review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### Prophecy's Marketing Direction Shift

  - [Moving towards "AI native" analytics and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Emphasizing AI's interaction with data practices](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Continuing to position as "AI data analysis" solution](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [De-emphasizing data governance as a primary selling point](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Focus on end-to-end analytics process, similar to modern data stack companies](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Prioritize AI and data analysis topics](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Explore AI's impact on data practices and trends](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Maintain SEO-driven content while expanding into broader marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Potential increase in GrowthX's involvement for efficiency and future-proofing](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Evolution

  - [Discussed possibility of "Strategy Sprints" to define new content lanes](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Potential for expanded role beyond SEO content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Exploration of additional services like newsletter creation and long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Immediate Content Management

  - [Cody to review and approve pending content before two-week absence](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Need to establish interim content review and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Raveena to handle publishing during Cody's absence](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Traffic holding steady with slight dip in sessions](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Recovering from previous traffic decline](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Current content pipeline: 5 articles in progress, 4 staged for review, 5 published last week](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### Internal Alignment Challenges

  - [Navigating feedback from technical founders on content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Balancing technical accuracy with marketing effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Potential for increased involvement from CEO (Raj) in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-yasP-FAxJC1xLB-JpQpoEmrDK-yiJty?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
